jd_text: We are building a home service vertical in Dubai from the ground up. This role is for someone who has already done it — not someone who wants to learn how. You will be responsible for launching, structuring, and scaling a fully operational home service unit across beauty and massage. Who we are looking for We are looking for an operator with direct, hands-on experience in running home services in Dubai someone who understands both the commercial and operational realities of the market. You should have: Proven experience launching or managing a home service business (beauty, wellness, or similar) Deep understanding of Dubai’s customer behavior, pricing sensitivity, and demand cycles Existing access to a network of technicians (nails, hair, massage) who can be activated quickly Experience managing scheduling, routing, and dispatch in a live environment Strong control over pricing, margins, and commission structures This is a build-and-execute role, not a coordination role. Mandatory experience Minimum 5+ years managing a women’s salon in Dubai Direct involvement in home service operations Demonstrated ability to build and deploy teams quickly, including assembling a 5-person specialist team within 30 days Proven ability to launch and execute live services within 60 days Strong commercial awareness (unit economics, pricing, retention) Not suitable for Candidates with only salon floor or branch management experience Profiles without real exposure to home service logistics Candidates relying on hiring through job portals to build teams Those who prefer structured environments over building from zero What you get Full ownership of the home service vertical Marketing budget and demand generation support Operational and technical infrastructure Performance-based compensation directly tied to profitability
